title: Mario Paint Composer - Megaman 7: A Hero Returns (Staff Roll)
description:
Still not dead. So far.

Was listening to this and suddenly thought to look up MPC covers. Didn't find any, so hey, why not? ...Of course, now I want to hear Smooth McGroove's rendition of this.
